description: Watch the TV's own apps (IVI, browser, live TV, etc.) with audio routed through the eMotiva and the Musical Fidelity amp via HDMI ARC. The TV is the source; the processor's HDMI ARC return carries the TV's audio back into the AV chain. ARC engagement is automatic on processor power-up when the TV is on its internal mode (Home / any non-HDMI app).

startup: 💡 Dim the living room lights if needed
shutdown: 💡 Don't forget to turn the lights back on
